description: You are an office supervisor whose inbox is getting cluttered with project-related emails mixed in with everything else. Organize your Project Alpha emails by creating a new mail folder named 'ProjectAlpha' under Local Folders and configuring a message filter named 'Project Alpha Filter'. The filter must move messages where the subject contains 'Project Alpha' to the 'ProjectAlpha' folder. Ensure the filter is applied to the current Inbox to organize existing messages.
